title: Metals Gain Amid Signs Of Tight Supplies
section_path: Metals Gain Amid Signs Of Tight Supplies
section_path_text: Metals Gain Amid Signs Of Tight Supplies
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodities edged higher as tight supplies and signs of robust demand boosted sentiment. Bulk commodities remained under pressure amid ongoing weakness in China's real estate market. Crude oil gained sharply in early trade amid optimism China may ease quarantine restrictions.
